import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/bluecode2022/mvaccbackup/ecapbackup/ecapplus-superset/superset_env/lib/python3.10/site-packages'\)

from superset.app import create_app
app = create_app\(\)

with app.app_context\(\):
    from superset.extensions import db
    from superset.models.embedded_dashboard import EmbeddedDashboard
    
    embeds = db.session.query\(EmbeddedDashboard\).all\(\)
    for e in embeds:
        print\(f"Dashboard ID: {e.dashboard_id}, UUID: {e.uuid}"\)
        print\(f"  Current allowed_domains: '{e.allow_domain_list}'"\)
        # Update allowed domains to include both frontend apps
        e.allow_domain_list = ""  # empty means all domains allowed
        print\(f"  Updated allowed_domains: '{e.allow_domain_list}' \(empty = all allowed\)"\)
    
    db.session.commit\(\)
    print\("\\nDone!"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(SUPERSET_CONFIG_PATH=/home/bluecode2022/mvaccbackup/ecapbackup/ecapplus-superset/superset_config.py /usr/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/bluecode2022/mvaccbackup/ecapbackup/ecapplus-superset/superset_env/lib/python3.10/site-packages'\)

from superset.app import create_app
app = create_app\(\)

with app.app_context\(\):
    from superset.extensions import db, security_manager

    public_role = security_manager.find_role\("Public"\)

    # Permissions required for embedded dashboard guest token users
    required_perms = [
        \("can_read", "Chart"\),
        \("can_read", "Dashboard"\),
        \("can_read", "Dataset"\),
        \("can_read", "DashboardFilterStateRestApi"\),
        \("can_read", "EmbeddedDashboard"\),
        \("can_read", "Explore"\),
        \("can_read", "ExploreFormDataRestApi"\),
        \("can_read", "ExplorePermalinkRestApi"\),
        \("can_write", "DashboardFilterStateRestApi"\),
        \("can_write", "ExploreFormDataRestApi"\),
        \("can_write", "ExplorePermalinkRestApi"\),
        \("can_dashboard", "Superset"\),
        \("can_explore_json", "Superset"\),
        \("can_guest_token", "SecurityRestApi"\),
        \("menu_access", "Dashboards"\),
        \("menu_access", "Charts"\),
        # Chart data access
        \("can_read", "ChartDataRestApi"\),
        \("can_time_range", "Api"\),
    ]

    added = []
    for action_name, resource_name in required_perms:
        perm = security_manager.find_permission_view_menu\(action_name, resource_name\)
        if perm is None:
            print\(f"  SKIP \(not found\): {action_name} on {resource_name}"\)
            continue
        if perm not in public_role.permissions:
            security_manager.add_permission_role\(public_role, perm\)
            added.append\(f"{action_name} on {resource_name}"\)

    db.session.commit\(\)

    print\(f"\\nAdded {len\(added\)} permissions to Public role:"\)
    for a in added:
        print\(f"  + {a}"\)

    print\(f"\\nPublic role now has {len\(public_role.permissions\)} permissions total"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(SUPERSET_CONFIG_PATH=/home/bluecode2022/mvaccbackup/ecapbackup/ecapplus-superset/superset_config.py /usr/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/bluecode2022/mvaccbackup/ecapbackup/ecapplus-superset/superset_env/lib/python3.10/site-packages'\)

from superset.app import create_app
app = create_app\(\)

with app.app_context\(\):
    from superset.extensions import db, security_manager
    
    # Find all permissions related to chart data
    all_pvms = security_manager.get_session.query\(
        security_manager.permissionview_model
    \).all\(\)
    
    chart_perms = [p for p in all_pvms if 'chart' in str\(p\).lower\(\) or 'data' in str\(p\).lower\(\)]
    for p in sorted\(chart_perms, key=str\):
        print\(p\)
PYEOF)

Bash(SUPERSET_CONFIG_PATH=/home/bluecode2022/mvaccbackup/ecapbackup/ecapplus-superset/superset_config.py /usr/bin/python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/bluecode2022/mvaccbackup/ecapbackup/ecapplus-superset/superset_env/lib/python3.10/site-packages'\)

from superset.app import create_app
app = create_app\(\)

with app.app_context\(\):
    from superset.extensions import db, security_manager

    public_role = security_manager.find_role\("Public"\)
    
    # Add all datasource access permissions + database access + schema access
    all_pvms = security_manager.get_session.query\(
        security_manager.permissionview_model
    \).all\(\)
    
    added = []
    for pvm in all_pvms:
        pvm_str = str\(pvm\)
        # Add datasource access, database access, schema access, and catalog access
        if any\(x in pvm_str for x in [
            "datasource access on [ECAP Plus",
            "database access on [ECAP Plus",
            "schema access on [ECAP Plus",
            "catalog access on [ECAP Plus",
            "all datasource access",
            "all database access",
            "can view chart as table on Dashboard",
            "can fetch datasource metadata on Superset",
            "can query form data on Api",
        ]\):
            if pvm not in public_role.permissions:
                security_manager.add_permission_role\(public_role, pvm\)
                added.append\(pvm_str\)
    
    db.session.commit\(\)
    
    print\(f"Added {len\(added\)} data access permissions:"\)
    for a in added:
        print\(f"  + {a}"\)
    print\(f"\\nPublic role now has {len\(public_role.permissions\)} permissions total"\)
PYEOF)
